name: Mad Experiments: Escape Room - Sanctuary
short_description: First‑person escape‑room puzzler (1–4 players). Unite the Horn of the Fallen One, Scepter of Radiance, and Abbot’s Ring to escape a cursed convent in 60–90 minutes.
detailed_description:
From the award-winning creator of Mad Experiments: Escape Room 1 & 2

Dive into a brand-new first-person escape-room adventure for 1–4 players (60–90 min). A forsaken convent hides the Horn of the Fallen One, Scepter of Radiance, and Abbot’s Ring behind a web of ritual, light, and music trials—will you reclaim them all before time runs out?

  • Seamless cross-platform co-op – PC, Mac, and Linux players team up instantly.

  • Three-relic quest – unite Horn, Scepter, and Ring on the altar to open the final door.

  • Signature set-piece puzzles – bend a mirror-guided light beam, ring a bell melody, and piece together the abbots’ chronology.

  • Hidden-prison finale – uncover a sealed passage beneath the cloisters for one last, pulse-pounding challenge.

  • Fully voiced narrative – every clue and revelation delivered by professional performers.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
